payload.goal: Automated controlled benchmark: one long session vs fresh-sessions-per-task (Sofar pattern), measuring cost shape, output quality, and time. Second scenario of handoff-bench; reuses its harness, blind-grading machinery, and evidence format.

payload.cmd: sofar new session-strategy-bench --goal "Automated controlled benchmark: one long session vs fresh-sessions-per-task (Sofar pattern), measuring cost shape, output quality, and time. Second scenario of handoff-bench; reuses its harness, blind-grading machinery, and evidence format."

sofar event append --type session_ended --payload '{"summary":"Orientation only — no init-statusline changes. This session created the session-strategy-bench initiative; main rebound to it (init-statusline 4/4 complete).","next_action":"User runs sofar init --statusline in repos wanting the rent-meter; release ship (bump + publish) still pending if new work lands."}' --session 3af72ace-92ae-493b-9040-19c1b1efd9a5 init-statusline

plan.goal: Automated controlled benchmark: one long session vs fresh-sessions-per-task (Sofar pattern), measuring cost shape, output quality, and time. Second scenario of handoff-bench; reuses its harness, blind-grading machinery, and evidence format. MEASURES only — read-side; zero engine/injection changes; findings that suggest engine changes are logged as proposals.

phases.name: Phase 1 — Pre-registration freeze (all frozen/committed before run 1)

tasks.title: Evidence file alongside R04's with P1–P4 predictions frozen verbatim (deliverable 2a)
Grading rubric frozen — adapt handoff-bench RUBRIC.md: correctness, completeness, consistency-with-prior-decisions; graders see products only, never arm labels (deliverable 2b)
Workload W1 — feature build: frozen snapshot repo + 5–8 real dependent tasks, ≥2h agent work (deliverable 3)
Workload W2 — refactor: frozen snapshot + task list; minimum 2 workload types before any headline claim (deliverable 3)

Runner script: arm L (one headless claude -p session, all tasks sequential, never ends) + arm S (fresh headless session per task: orient from record → work → sofar write-back, Stop-gate satisfied); same model/snapshot/task list/templated prompts; resumable
Usage extraction from transcripts: per-call input, cache read/write with 5m/1h split, output tokens, per-call latency; wall-clock per task; diff/artifact capture per task
Run W1 (feature) both arms — runner, rubric, predictions committed before this executes
Blind grading: dual graders, ≥1 cross-family (GLM or equivalent); label 'blind LLM-graded, cross-family' only if both ran
Per-task tables + cost-per-task-over-task-index curve per arm; M-capture write-back overhead (arm S) reported alongside the rent it replaces (deliverable 4)
Caveats log in evidence file: observational confounds, grader provenance, workload count — every caveat, none dropped
Honest-summary paragraph: where S won, where L won (P3 territory), with numbers — marketing copy comes only from this (deliverable 5)

payload.because: The benchmark must be able to lose — P3 registers a case where the long session is expected to WIN, so a clean sweep for arm S would itself be suspect. Falsified predictions get recorded as falsified; marketing copy derives only from the honest-summary paragraph.
payload.chose: Pre-registered falsifiable predictions (P1 cost-climb-vs-flat, P2 quality-parity, P3 arm L wins verbatim-recall-from-early-session — deliberately the opponent's territory, P4 latency-growth) frozen in product doc/session-strategy-bench-evidence.md at initiative creation, before any run
payload.over: Post-hoc analysis of whatever the data shows, or predictions written/softened after seeing run 1

payload.because: Measuring and optimizing in one initiative contaminates both: the numbers stop being comparable across runs and the changes ship without their own acceptance criteria. Injection byte-stability is a SPEC invariant; this bench depends on the measured surface staying frozen.
payload.chose: Measure-only jurisdiction: read-side only, zero changes to engine or injection content; any finding that suggests an engine change is logged as a proposal in this record, never implemented here
payload.over: Letting benchmark findings drive engine/injection tweaks in-flight within this initiative

payload.because: R04's judge-provenance mitigations (cross-family re-grade + founder spot-check, both cleared 2026-07-11) set the credibility bar; a second scenario inherits it by reusing the same machinery instead of re-earning it. Single-workload results are an anecdote, not a claim.
payload.chose: Reuse the handoff-bench machinery: harness/rubric base at ~/IO/handoff-bench, evidence file alongside R04's in product doc/ (sofar-bench format), dual blind graders with >=1 cross-family, "blind LLM-graded, cross-family" label only when both graders ran, and minimum 2 workload types (feature + refactor) before any headline claim
payload.over: Building a new bench, single-family (Anthropic-only) grading, or headline claims from one workload

payload.text: Charter anchors: predictions + frozen design live in "product doc/session-strategy-bench-evidence.md" (P1 L-cost climbs/S flat; P2 quality parity on batch tasks; P3 L wins verbatim-recall from early same-session — opponent territory; P4 L latency grows with prefix). Harness to reuse: ~/IO/handoff-bench (RUBRIC.md, METHODOLOGY.md, scripts/). R04 evidence precedent: "product doc/sofar-phase0-run-R01-cmodel.md". Integrity: runner+rubric+predictions committed before run 1; no softening after data.

payload.summary: Created session-strategy-bench: 4-phase/12-task plan mapped to the 5 deliverables, 3 decisions (pre-registered falsifiable P1–P4 incl. P3 opponent-territory; measure-only read-side jurisdiction; reuse handoff-bench machinery, cross-family grading, 2-workload minimum). Predictions frozen verbatim in "product doc/session-strategy-bench-evidence.md" (1.1 done). init-statusline closed out (stub session ended, Phase 1 marked done); main rebound here.

payload.because: The Stop gate makes "session never ends" impossible for a wired arm L and would contaminate the treatment: L must be the pure long-session strategy (context as memory), S the pure sofar pattern (record as memory). TASKS.md as the shared task source is the only way to keep prompts byte-identical while each arm keeps its own memory channel.
payload.chose: Arm L runs in a worktree with sofar wiring stripped (sofar uninit --purge; scenario-1 arm-A doctoring precedent); both arms share a frozen TASKS.md committed into the snapshot so task prompts stay byte-identical; arm S's initiative plan is seeded from TASKS.md
payload.over: Running arm L with sofar wired (its Stop hook exits 2 on any turn without session_ended, forcing per-task write-backs), or arm-specific prompt wording pointing arm S at the record

payload.note: Frozen at handoff-bench 7cc2912: scenario2-session-strategy/RUBRIC.md (Q1/Q2/Q3 anchors, per-task diff grading unit, products-only blind protocol) + prompts/grader-prompt.md

W2 frozen: provider-route collapse + invoiceStatusConfig promotion + adapter scaffolding on brillo @ a6e0c8d2, 6 tasks, probe task 6 (exact OAuth URLs). Screened against brillo's recorded-rejected refactors. workloads/w2-refactor-provider-routes.md @ 7cc2912

Runner written + committed (scripts/run-workload.sh @ 7cc2912): arm L --resume chaining, arm S fresh -p per task, resumable via done-markers, per-task diff sweep commits. NOT smoke-tested — README checklist (resume mechanics, arm S MCP permissions, Stop-gate) must pass before marking done.

Extractor written + committed (scripts/extract-usage.py @ 7cc2912): pricing table (fable 10/50, opus 5/25, sonnet 3/15, haiku 1/5 per MTok; read 0.1x, 5m write 1.25x, 1h write 2x), TTFT from receive stamps, compaction count, sofar-call M-capture.
